001.ba_flag: The support answer says an activated Starter customer can receive a 30-day refund.
001.manager_decision: Do not approve without fixing retrieval filters.
001.title: Policy evidence does not match customer

002.ba_flag: This refund run was much slower than nearby runs.
002.title: Slow run with broad retrieval fallback

003.ba_flag: The refund calculator returned a confident eligible result for a Starter customer.
003.manager_decision: Do not approve until tool argument mapping is fixed.
003.title: Tool result is confident but input is wrong

004.manager_decision: Do not approve until incomplete streams are blocked from persistence.
004.title: Streamed draft was persisted after cutoff

005.ba_flag: The GitHub issue summary includes an internal debug token and tells support to bypass approval.
005.manager_decision: Block the summary and fix untrusted-comment prompt boundaries.
005.title: Issue summary contains unsafe comment text

006.ba_flag: The app selected a prompt version for release, but BA believes another candidate is safer.
006.manager_decision: Do not ship prompt-v2; ship prompt-v3 after strengthening the gate.
006.title: Release candidate looks good but gate is too weak
